hero.subtitle: Since 2014, we have been supporting students in Douala from primary to high school with qualified teachers, personalised follow-up and concrete results.

stats.section_subtitle: 10 years of commitment to families in Douala — figures that reflect our dedication.

how_it_works.section_subtitle: We have simplified the process so your child starts progressing as quickly as possible.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Create your account in 2 minutes, no commitment. Describe your child's needs and choose subjects.
how_it_works.step2_desc: One of our teachers assesses your child's level and builds a personalised programme. It's free.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Lessons begin, you track progress in real time via your parent dashboard. Grades improve week after week.

courses.title: All subjects, all levels
courses.subtitle: From Year 1 to A-levels, our teachers cover the full Cameroonian curriculum with pedagogy and passion.

why_pes.title: What makes us different
why_pes.subtitle: We are not just a classroom. We are a success partner for your family.
why_pes.adv1_desc: Each teacher is selected after an interview, a teaching test and degree verification.
why_pes.adv2_desc: Weekday or weekend lessons, in-centre or at home, according to your family's schedule.
why_pes.adv3_desc: Maximum 5 students per group to ensure individual attention. Private lessons available.
why_pes.adv4_desc: CEP, BEPC, BAC, Probatoire — we know the Cameroonian exam papers inside out.
why_pes.adv5_desc: Your parent dashboard keeps you informed of attendance, grades and progress after every lesson.
why_pes.adv6_desc: If you are not satisfied after the first month, we give you a full refund — no conditions.

testimonials.title: What families say
testimonials.subtitle: The trust of hundreds of families in Douala drives us to excellence every day.

pricing.title: Choose your child's success
pricing.subtitle: Whatever plan you choose, you get a free assessment and a first trial lesson with no commitment.
pricing.urgency: Limited places — Enrolments open for the current term
pricing.no_commitment: No commitment. No credit card required at sign-up. Pricing is shared during your free assessment.
pricing.plan1_tagline: The foundation for a great start

cta.title: Ready to boost your child's results?
cta.subtitle: Sign up today and get a free trial lesson.

about.hero_title: A mission born from a passion for education
about.hero_subtitle: Since 2014, we have been transforming the way students relate to learning in Douala — with love, method and ambition.
about.mission_body: Our mission is simple: every child entrusted to us leaves with more confidence, better methods and improved results. We believe academic success is not a privilege — it is a right we help make accessible.
about.val1_desc: We never settle for the minimum. Every teacher, every lesson, every follow-up targets the best possible outcome.
about.val2_desc: A student who feels confident learns better. Our teachers create a safe, encouraging environment.
about.val3_desc: Method makes the difference. Our programmes are structured, monitored and constantly adjusted to track progress.
about.val4_desc: We treat every family as a partner. Transparent communication is our daily commitment.
about.team_subtitle: All selected for their pedagogical expertise and their commitment to students.
about.cta_subtitle: Enrol your child today and start seeing the difference.

services.meta_title: Our courses and services | Pôle d'Excellence Scolaire
services.title: Our courses and services
services.subtitle: Personalized support from primary to high school, covering the full Cameroonian curriculum.
services.primary_desc: From Year 1 to Year 6, we build solid foundations: reading, arithmetic, reasoning. Gentle and structured support for the youngest learners.
services.middle_desc: From Year 7 to Year 10, we prepare for the BEPC with method: maths, physics, biology, English, French, geography.
services.high_desc: From Year 11 to Year 13, preparation for the Baccalauréat (BAC A, C, D, TI), Probatoire and regular mock exams.
services.angloSecondary_desc: From Form 1 to Form 5, we prepare students for the GCE O-Level: Mathematics, Sciences, English Language, Geography and more.
services.angloHigh_desc: In Lower Sixth and Upper Sixth, we prepare students for GCE A-Level to access universities — sciences, economics, literature.
services.method1_desc: A thorough evaluation of the student's level to precisely identify gaps and strengths.
services.method2_desc: Each student has their own learning path adapted to their needs, pace and school level.
services.method3_desc: Weekly reports, grades after each session, real-time parent access.
services.method4_desc: Exam simulations under real conditions to acclimatise students to the pressure and official format.
services.cta_title: Find the right programme for your child
